```python
from langchain.prompts import SystemMessagePromptTemplate, HumanMessagePromptTemplate, ChatPromptTemplate

# Define the system prompt
system_template = "You are a helpful assistant that can answer questions and provide information based on the data provided."
system_message_prompt = SystemMessagePromptTemplate.from_template(system_template)

# Define the human prompt
human_template = "{text}"
human_message_prompt = HumanMessagePromptTemplate.from_template(human_template)

# Combine the prompts into a chat prompt
chat_prompt = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([system_message_prompt, human_message_prompt])

# Example usage
user_input = "What is the capital of France?"
final_prompt = chat_prompt.format_prompt(text=user_input)
print(final_prompt.to_messages())
```
